author: Jagjeevan Kashid
name: 11L Dual-Layer Engram + Canonical 2/3-gram Memory
blurb: Record candidate on the 11L XSA4/EMA/Partial-RoPE/LN-scale stack. Replaces input-only BigramHash with selected-layer Engram modules at layers 1 and 5 using canonicalized SentencePiece IDs, dual-order 2/3-gram hashed memory, contextual gating, and a causal depthwise mixer. Full GPU metrics pending validation.
